query: "Crime and Punishment" Pevear Volokhonsky translation page count commonly cited
answer: The Pevear and Volokhonsky translation of Crime and Punishment has 564 pages. It is highly regarded and praised for its accuracy. This edition is published by Vintage Classics.

results.title: [PDF] Crime and Punishment - Veritas Press

results.title: Crime and Punishment - Translation? Showing 1-50 of 51 - Goodreads
results.snippet: The best so far is the Pevear and Volokhonsky translation. I read Crime and Punishment before by Garnett and did not leave an imprint on my mind.

results.snippet: Crime and Punishment is considered the first great novel of his mature period of writing and is often cited as one of the greatest works of world literature.
